column1: # Owner: Jane. Machine-readable. John: parse this; don't hardcode a starting weapon.
# Tab-separated. '#' comments and blank lines ignored.
# THE RULE: no starting weapon may require aiming.
# The Chain used to be the Warden's opener. It fires in your facing direction,
# and facing comes from your last horizontal input — so to hit a thing you had to
# walk toward it, in a game where things hurt you by touching you. The starting
# weapon was asking the player to walk into the damage. Nova seeks, Cinder Trail
# drops behind you, Wisp Lantern orbits. Directional weapons are things you CHOOSE.
# hp / move / area / luck / gold are multipliers on the base (design.md §6),
# except hp which is absolute. unlock = gold cost at The Crossroads; 0 = default.

column11: fragile, fast, burns the floor behind her
